2026-05-26JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the District of QuébecAppointment of Nicolas Moisan, of the City of Québec, in the Province of Quebec, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the district of Québec, with residence in the territory of Ville de Québec or in the immediate vicinity thereof.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the District of Québec
precis: Appointment of Nicolas Moisan, of the City of Québec, in the Province of Quebec, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the district of Québec, with residence in the territory of Ville de Québec or in the immediate vicinity thereof.
